subject: [AAI] OOM AAI resources logging structure enhancement
commit_message:
[AAI] OOM AAI resources logging structure enhancement

Included logback changes
Update aai resources image

Issue-ID: AAI-3524

Signed-off-by: Rommel Pawar <rommel.pawar@bell.ca>
Change-Id: If70c8c285c0c8c9b5c8b24962e9e01b8c87229ff

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5731/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5731/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5731/ )
